outcomes: Analyze the factors that accelerated African nationalism after 1945, highlighting the role of WWII returnees and pan-Africanism
Trace the constitutional milestones leading to Kenya's independence, evaluating the Lancaster House Conferences (1960-1962) frameworks

sub_strands.sub_strand: The Legislature and Devolved County Fiscal Frameworks
outcomes: Examine the legislative process, structures, and roles of the National Assembly and Senate in bicameral systems
Critique the revenue allocation mechanisms between national and county governments, analyzing the role of the Commission on Revenue Allocation (CRA)

sub_strands.sub_strand: Global Winds, Pressure Belts, and Weather Forecasting Systems
outcomes: Examine the planetary wind systems, planetary pressure belts, and the dynamics of the Inter-Tropical Convergence Zone (ITCZ)
Interpret complex synoptic weather maps to model short-term regional weather variations
Differentiate physical, chemical, and biological weathering processes across diverse climatic zones
Evaluate the causes, categories, and direct environmental hazards associated with rapid mass wasting events
